case_title: NORTHERN CALIFORNIA DISTRICT COUNCIL OF LABORES, VS. ATOLI TOPUI ISLAND, INC et al

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PETITIONER NORTHERN CALIFORNIA DISTRICT COUNCIL OF LABORES, ON BEHALF OF ITSELF AND ON BEHALF OF LABORERS LOCAL 324

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER NORTHERN CALIFORNIA DISTRICT COUNCIL OF LABORES, ON BEHALF OF ITSELF AND ON BEHALF OF LABORERS LOCAL 324 RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT ATOLI TOPUI ISLAND, INC $22,470.00 PRINCIPAL, $1,112.50 ATTORNEY FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $23,582.50, SEE SCANNED DOC

PROOF OF SERVICE OF NOTICE OF HEARING, MEMO OF P&A; DECLARATION OF CONCEPCION E. LOZANO-BATISTA, INDEX OF FEDERAL AUTHORITIES, [PROPOSED] ORDER; [PROPOSED] ORDER; PETITION TO CONFIRM ARB AWARD; CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED BY PETITIONER NORTHERN CALIFORNIA DISTRICT COUNCIL OF LABORES, ON BEHALF OF ITSELF AND ON BEHALF OF LABORERS LOCAL 324 SERVED OCT-19-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO RESPONDENT ATOLI TOPUI ISLAND, INC

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER NORTHERN CALIFORNIA DISTRICT COUNCIL OF LABORERS, ON BEHALF OF ITSELF AND ON BEHALF OF LABORERS LOCAL 324'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD. RULING: NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) (302/PJM) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600
